description: Style NoteTake a refined approach to workwear bags with bulchee's Spring '12 line. The line has minimal hardware and are delectably hued (and are crafted from handpicked materials) so you'll want more than just one. Guaranteed to leave you "bag-struck", punctuate your everyday ensemble with this uber cool bag.Product DetailsBlack velvetty upper with two short handles and one detachable, adjustable shoulder strapHas a lock detail in gold hardware on the front for style and a vertical zipper with room to hold small essentials like keys and phonesOne main zipped compartment with a zipped pocket, two pouches and a zipped separatorHas a zipped pocket at the backMaterial and Care LeatheretteWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not expose to detergents, alcohol or petroleumSizeHeight: 36 cmWidth: 33 cmDepth: 18 cm
